positive: A sophisticated, abstract representation of a rising sun over a minimalist mountain range silhouette. The color palette is rich indigo, deep navy, burnished gold, and dusty coral. The composition is perfectly centered, featuring clean, stylized geometric peaks and a perfectly symmetrical sun disc that radiates warm, gradient lines. The style should be high-contrast vector art mixed with a watercolor wash texture, suitable for screen printing on t-shirts. Emphasis on strong negative space and elegant curves. Clean silhouette, symmetrical design, celestial, modern abstract, print-friendly.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, signature, copyright, poor quality, noise, grainy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail
